title: 2 REITs To Buy In January 2024
text: Most REITs rallied in December. But not all REITs participated in this rally to the same degree. Here are two REITs that remain very attractively priced.

title: AvalonBay Communities: Why We Chose This Residential REIT Over Its Peers
text: AvalonBay Communities has a strong portfolio of high-quality multifamily buildings in coastal markets. The company has a unique development capability that drives external growth and consistently strong profit margins. AvalonBay has a strong balance sheet with a low cost of debt and ample liquidity, allowing for leverage-neutral investment capacity.

title: Who's Buying These 'Fortress' A-Rated REITs?
text: Blue chip REITs are high-quality companies with access to equity and debt, stable earnings, and conservative dividend policies. Eight A-rated REITs with strong balance sheets and credit ratings are highlighted, including Realty Income, Equity Residential, AvalonBay, Simon Property Group, Prologis, Public Storage, MidAmerica, and Camden Property. These REITs have demonstrated consistent growth in adjusted funds from operations and dividends, making them attractive investments.

title: Why I Quit Private Equity Real Estate To Buy REITs Instead
text: I used to invest only in private equity real estate. But these days, I focus mainly on REITs. Here's why.

title: Income, Growth And Safety - How To Play It Safe And Still Win Big
text: I built a model portfolio that consists of the highest-quality REITs using our proprietary tracker. I want to highlight the safest, highest-quality REITs on the market. I also want to show that investors can still outperform the market with safe stocks.

title: This High-Yield Stock Is Experiencing an Unprecedented Environment Change
text: UDR is an apartment REIT with a diversified portfolio. The stock's 4.8% dividend yield is higher than that of its most prominent peer.

title: Buy or Bye? 7 Key Housing Stocks to Buy or Sell in Today's Market.
text: Finding the best stocks to buy and sell in real estate can be challenging. The housing stock sector continues to be volatile and full of opportunity at the same time.

title: AvalonBay Communities, Inc. Prices $400 Million Senior Notes Offering
text: ARLINGTON, Va.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--AVALONBAY COMMUNITIES, INC. (NYSE: AVB) (the “Company”) announced today that it priced an underwritten public offering of $400 million of 5.300% senior unsecured notes due 2033 (the “Notes”). The offering is expected to close on December 7, 2023, subject to the satisfaction of customary closing conditions. Details of the offering are set forth in the table below:   Principal Amount Maturity Date Issue Price Coupon Rate Yield to Investors 5.300% Senior Notes due.

title: Want Decades of Passive Income? 2 Stocks to Buy Now
text: REITs are designed to pass income on to investors and, increasingly, size matters. AvalonBay is one of the largest and best-run apartment landlords.
